evals.name: handoff-status-report
evals.prompt: Use GitHub as the source of truth and prepare a handoff for the current AI task queue.
assertions: Inspects GitHub Issues or Projects before reporting status
Includes handoff log or comment guidance
Mentions owners, blockers, next action, and evidence

evals.name: bootstrap-project-management
evals.prompt: Set up GitHub labels, project fields, and automation for AI/human project management.
assertions: Uses GitHub Projects fields for live status
Includes gh or gh api commands and security constraints

evals.name: skill-chain-release
evals.prompt: Create a pipeline using issues, PRs, CI and skills to ship a feature and hand it off.
assertions: Chains relevant skills such as ck:scout, ck:plan, ck:cook, ck:test, ck:git, ck:ship or review-pr
Links PR/check evidence back to issues
Uses GitHub as canonical state instead of local-only notes
